summary: WM Finance Iteration 7 - All new features tested successfully: (1) Made by Knyazev badge visible in bottom right corner, (2) Integrations page (/settings/integrations) with Telegram Bot settings (token, chat ID, auto-summary, schedule, time), (3) FAQ page has 'Первоначальная настройка' (setup-checklist) section with checklist for initial setup. Backend 100% pass rate (10/10 tests). Frontend 100% - all features working correctly.

issues: Console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts library sizing issue during initial render (cosmetic only, carried over from previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: Superadmin login with admin/220066mm returns correct token and user with role='superadmin'
Backend: Superadmin wrong password correctly returns 401
Backend: GET /settings/integrations returns integration settings
Backend: PUT /settings/integrations/telegram updates Telegram settings correctly
Backend: POST /settings/telegram/test endpoint exists and responds
Backend: POST /settings/telegram/send-summary returns 400 when Telegram not configured
Backend: /accounts endpoint regression test passed
Backend: /categories endpoint regression test passed
Backend: /directions endpoint regression test passed
Backend: /analytics/summary regression test passed
Frontend: 'Made by Knyazev' badge visible on login page (bottom right)
Frontend: 'Made by Knyazev' badge visible on dashboard (bottom right)
Frontend: MK logo displayed correctly next to badge text
Frontend: Superadmin login (admin/220066mm) successfully redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Integrations page (/settings/integrations) loads correctly
Frontend: Telegram Bot section found with title 'Telegram Bot'
Frontend: Bot Token input field [data-testid='telegram-bot-token'] present
Frontend: Chat ID input field [data-testid='telegram-chat-id'] present
Frontend: Test connection button [data-testid='test-telegram-btn'] present
Frontend: Save settings button [data-testid='save-telegram-btn'] present
Frontend: Auto summary switch [data-testid='auto-summary-switch'] present
Frontend: Schedule selector and Time input present for auto-summary
Frontend: FAQ page (/faq) loads with 'Справка и FAQ' header
Frontend: 'Первоначальная настройка' section found in FAQ navigation
Frontend: Setup checklist question 'Что нужно настроить после первого входа?' found
Frontend: 'Как настроить Telegram бота?' question found in FAQ
Frontend: Checklist items (Счета, Категории, Направления, Контрагенты) displayed correctly
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Интеграции' menu item
Frontend: Link to Adesk migration visible in integrations page
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer components to suppress Recharts console warnings (carried over from previous iterations)
seed_data_creation: Integration settings auto-created when first accessed if not exists

mocked_apis.Telegram API (api.telegram.org): Real API - test connection sends actual message if valid token/chat_id provided
mocked_apis.Adesk API (api.adesk.ru): MOCKED - requires real API token for actual migration

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features working. New features: (1) Made by Knyazev badge in /frontend/public/index.html with MK logo from /frontend/public/mk-logo.png, (2) Integrations page at /settings/integrations with Telegram settings endpoints: GET /settings/integrations, PUT /settings/integrations/telegram, POST /settings/telegram/test, POST /settings/telegram/send-summary, (3) FAQ page has 'Первоначальная настройка' section (id='setup-checklist') with initial setup checklist including Telegram and Adesk setup instructions.

questions: Что нужно настроить после первого входа?
Какие данные нужны для правил автоматизации?
checklist_items: Счета — добавьте все банковские счета и кассы
Категории — настройте статьи доходов и расходов
Направления — обычно уже созданы (Теплицы, Сауны, Купели)
Контрагенты — добавьте основных клиентов и поставщиков
Telegram Bot — для получения финансовых сводок
Миграция из Adesk — если переходите с другой системы
Правила категоризации — для автоматического присвоения категорий при импорте
